checkpoints.retryInstructions: 🔁 RETRY 1: Dockerfile is missing. Generate a minimal Node.js Dockerfile content as the output instead of checking for the file. Include: FROM node:20-alpine, WORKDIR /app, COPY package*.json ./, RUN npm ci --only=production, COPY dist/ ./dist/, EXPOSE 3000, CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"].
